allow: Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; img=Image.open\(''/c/Personal/dev/hog/img/harry.png''\); print\(''Harry:'', img.size, img.mode\); img2=Image.open\(''/c/Personal/dev/hog/img/hermione.png''\); print\(''Hermione:'', img2.size, img2.mode\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const buf=fs.readFileSync\(''/c/Personal/dev/hog/img/harry.png''\); console.log\(''Harry bytes:'', buf.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const b=fs.readFileSync\(''/c/Personal/dev/hog/img/harry.png''\); const view=new DataView\(b.buffer\); const w=view.getUint32\(16\); const h=view.getUint32\(20\); console.log\(''Harry: ''+w+''x''+h+'' — ''+b.length+'' bytes''\); const b2=fs.readFileSync\(''/c/Personal/dev/hog/img/hermione.png''\); const v2=new DataView\(b2.buffer\); console.log\(''Hermione: ''+v2.getUint32\(16\)+''x''+v2.getUint32\(20\)+'' — ''+b2.length+'' bytes''\);")

Bash(cmd /c "where magick 2>nul && echo magick_found || where ffmpeg 2>nul && echo ffmpeg_found || where python 2>nul && echo python_found || where node 2>nul && echo node_found || echo nothing_found")
